title: Open weights are quietly closing up - and that's a problem - Martin Alderson
description: Open weights models keep frontier labs honest on price. If they disappear, we end up with a handful of oligopolists extracting consumer surplus.

title: Harness Engineering: How OpenAI Ships Without Writing Code | SWE Quiz
description: OpenAI ran a five-month experiment building an internal product with zero manually-written code: ~1,500 PRs, ~1 million lines of code, a team that grew from 3 to 7 engineers. The p

title: Pinterest crosses $1 billion quarterly revenue as AI-powered visual search drives advertising growth that social platforms cannot match
description: Pinterest hit $1.008B in Q1 revenue with 631M MAUs. Performance+ AI ads delivered 24% higher conversions. The growth engine is 80 billion monthly visual searches, not social feeds.

title: Next year’s iPhone Pro models could get all-new design, quad-curved display - 9to5Mac
description: Apple’s rumored 20th anniversary iPhone might actually just be an all-new design that’s coming to next year’s iPhone Pro models.

title: LinkedIn Is Quietly Killing Video Reach, and the Data Proves It
description: Despite LinkedIn's aggressive push into short-form video after a 36% viewership surge in 2024, the data tells a completely different story.
